companies.name: Clever Llamavas Ltd
companies.description: Clever Llamavas is the llamaverse's most respected independent MarkLogic consultancy. Small by design, the firm takes a maximum of twelve active client engagements at any time. The firm is particularly known for performance turnarounds — assignments where a client's MarkLogic deployment is underperforming and Clever Llamavas is brought in to diagnose and fix. In every recorded engagement, the root cause has involved at least one missing index.
companies.marklogicUse: Internal project management and knowledge base — on MarkLogic, naturally
